topics.name: Algebraic Manipulation
topics.common_mistakes: Sign errors during expansion, forgetting to factorise completely
topics.remediation: Start with simple expansion drills, then progress to multi-step problems

topics.name: Quadratic Equations
topics.objectives: Solve quadratic equations using multiple methods and interpret discriminant
topics.common_mistakes: Forgetting ± in quadratic formula, errors in completing the square
topics.remediation: Practice all three methods on the same equation to build flexibility

topics.name: Surds
topics.common_mistakes: Incorrect rationalisation of denominators with two terms
topics.remediation: Focus on conjugate pairs for rationalisation

topics.name: Indices and Logarithms
topics.objectives: Apply index and logarithm laws to solve equations
topics.common_mistakes: Confusing log(a+b) with log(a)+log(b), wrong application of power rule
topics.remediation: Drill individual laws before combining them in equations

topics.name: Polynomials and Partial Fractions
topics.objectives: Use factor/remainder theorem and decompose into partial fractions
topics.common_mistakes: Sign errors in synthetic division, wrong form for partial fractions
topics.remediation: Practice factor theorem to find first root, then polynomial division

topics.name: Binomial Theorem
topics.objectives: Expand binomial expressions and find specific terms
topics.common_mistakes: Errors in nCr calculation, forgetting to apply power to both terms
topics.remediation: Start with Pascal's triangle for small n, then transition to formula

topics.name: Coordinate Geometry
topics.objectives: Apply coordinate geometry to solve problems involving lines and curves
topics.common_mistakes: Mixing up gradient conditions for parallel vs perpendicular
topics.remediation: Visualise on graph paper, connect algebraic and geometric interpretations

topics.name: Trigonometric Functions
topics.objectives: Understand and apply trigonometric functions and solve trig equations
topics.common_mistakes: Wrong quadrant for solutions, forgetting principal values
topics.remediation: Always draw the ASTC diagram, practice finding all solutions in range

topics.name: Trigonometric Identities and Equations
topics.objectives: Apply trig identities to prove results and solve complex equations
topics.common_mistakes: Confusing sin(A+B) with sinA+sinB, errors in R-formula
topics.remediation: Memorise the three key identities, practice proving before solving

topics.name: Differentiation
topics.objectives: Differentiate functions and apply to tangent/normal problems
topics.common_mistakes: Chain rule errors with composite functions, forgetting to multiply by inner derivative
topics.remediation: Practice chain rule separately before combining with product/quotient rules

topics.name: Applications of Differentiation
topics.objectives: Apply differentiation to optimisation and rate of change problems
topics.common_mistakes: Not verifying nature of stationary point, setting up wrong equation for optimisation
topics.remediation: Practice setting up the function to optimise from word problems

topics.name: Integration
topics.objectives: Integrate functions and apply to area calculations
topics.common_mistakes: Forgetting +C for indefinite integrals, wrong limits for area between curves
topics.remediation: Connect integration to differentiation first, then build to area applications

topics.name: Kinematics
topics.common_mistakes: Confusing when to differentiate vs integrate, sign conventions for direction
topics.remediation: Always start from the relationship: differentiate s→v→a, integrate a→v→s

topics.name: Linear Law
topics.objectives: Convert non-linear relationships to linear form and extract parameters
topics.common_mistakes: Wrong substitution for Y and X variables, reading gradient/intercept incorrectly
topics.remediation: Practice the algebraic manipulation to get Y = mX + c form

topics.name: Proofs in Plane Geometry
topics.objectives: Apply circle theorems to prove geometric results
topics.common_mistakes: Not identifying which theorem applies, incomplete proof structure
topics.remediation: Learn to recognise visual patterns for each theorem
